Results for 'top things to do restaurants and attractions' in Shillong, Meghalaya:
1. The Feast House - Cafe and Restaurant [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.2 (294 reviews) | ₹200–1,400

2. Zodiac Restaurant [Continental restaurant] ⭐ 4.5 (209 reviews) | ₹400–1,000
   📍 Zara's Arcade, Hindi School, Keating Rd
   "Best restaurants, family friendly and the staffs are the best ❤️"
3. Peary Hut Dhaba & Guest house [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.3 (76 reviews) | ₹200–400
   📍 Mawkathein, Shillong, Meghalaya, India
   "Must visit if you are looking for lunch/dinner near Latlium Canyon."
4. The Ambience Fine Dinning [Fine Dining] ⭐ 4.4 (221 reviews) | ₹400–1,400
